mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly depressing S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX forward 20-day returns show a positive correlation with FEDFUNDS increases over a 3-year rolling window, or Rank IC exceeds 0.05 in the wrong direction.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 4.5%, labor market deterioration triggers recession pricing, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in 70% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 4.5%, or the signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.02) during late-cycle phases.

mechanism_narrative: Strong retail sales growth combined with low federal funds rates amplifies consumer spending power, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns when RSAFS growth exceeds 2% and FEDFUNDS is below 3%, or interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production signals immediate capacity utilization improvements, driving positive short-term S&P 500 returns over the next week during recovery phases.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration fails to predict positive 5-day returns during post-shock recovery periods, or the signal reverses direction when GDP growth falls below 1%.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls increases aggregate income and corporate revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth shows zero or negative correlation with 20-day forward returns across all macro regimes, or Rank IC remains below 0.01 over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid inflation acceleration forces central bank tightening expectations, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive when CPIAUCSL MoM exceeds 0.4%, or the signal loses predictive accuracy (Rank IC < 0.02) during inflationary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts alongside falling unemployment indicate synchronized economic expansion, boosting corporate earnings forecasts and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to predict positive returns when HOUST growth exceeds 10% and UNRATE declines by 0.2pp, or the interaction effect vanishes in regression tests.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth above 2% confirms robust economic demand, supporting equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month during expansion phases.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth above 2% coincides with negative 20-day forward returns in 65% of cases, or the signal fails to maintain positive Rank IC during expansion regimes.
